title: Ancient Copper
body:
This resource pack adds a set of reimagined copper blocks for vanilla Minecraft.

**THIS PACK INCLUDES:**
- New textures for a variety of copper blocks
- Distinctive waxed variants for all copper blocks and items (_when in item form in inventory_)
- 3D textures for copper doors and trapdoors
- Glowing raw copper block

# **MY OTHER PACKS**

- [Happy Ghastling!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/happy-ghastling!)
- [Rounded Sun & Moon](https://modrinth.com/project/rounded-sun-moon-souralien)
- [Cute Axolotl Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cute-axolotl-totem)
- [Gray Alien Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gray-alien-totem)
- [Alice Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alice-font)
- [Paramita Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/paramita-font-by-souralien)
- [Marga Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/marga-font-by-souralien)
- [Warm Mojangles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/warm-mojangles)
- [SMALL CAPS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sas-small-caps)
- [all lowercase](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sas-all-lowercase)
- [Round Fireflies](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/roundfireflies)
